zh.lifeSummary: 當Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe於大約1292年出生在英國戴文時，她的父親John de Cantelupe47歲，母親Margaret de Mohun41歲。她於1308年之前與Thomas West在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1344年4月27日在英國瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe于大约1292年出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲John de Cantelupe47岁，母亲Margaret de Mohun41岁。她于1308年之前与Thomas West在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1344年4月27日在英国瓦維其可爾斯尼特費爾德享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe was born about 1292, in Devon, England, her father, John de Cantelupe, was 47 and her mother, Margaret de Mohun, was 41. She married Thomas West before 1308, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 April 1344, in Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe est née environ 1292, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, John de Cantelupe, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Mohun, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas West avant 1308, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 avril 1344, à Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe um 1292 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Cantelupe 47 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Mohun 41. Sie hat vor 1308 in Devon, England Thomas West geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. April 1344 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe è nata il circa 1292 nel Devon, England, sua padre, John de Cantelupe, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Mohun, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Thomas West prima del 1308, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 aprile 1344, nel Snitterfield, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupeが約1292年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John de Cantelupeは47歳，母Margaret de Mohunは41歳であった。1308年以前にイギリスデボンでThomas Westと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1344年4月27日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアスニッテルフィールドで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe(이)가 대략 1292년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Cantelupe(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Mohun(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1308년 이전 영국 데폰에서 Thomas West(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1344년 4월 27일 영국 워윅실르 스니터필드에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe nasceu aproximadamente 1292, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Cantelupe, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Mohun, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas West antes 1308, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de abril de 1344, em Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe родилась около 1292 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Cantelupe было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Mohun, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas West перед 1308 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 апреля 1344 г. в местности сниттирфиелд, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alianore Eleanor de Cantelupe nació aproximadamente 1292, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Cantelupe, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Margaret de Mohun, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Thomas West antes de 1308, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de abril de 1344, en Snitterfield, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
